name: Legion Commander
description: If they want war, then we shall give it to them! Tresdin, the Legion Commander When Legion commander or an allied Hero within 1200 range casts an ability, they gain bonus armor for 6s; allies gain 50% of the value. This bonus stacks independently.

abilities.name: Outfight Them!
abilities.description: When Legion commander or an allied Hero within 1200 range casts an ability, they gain bonus armor for 6s; allies gain 50% of the value. This bonus stacks independently.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Odds
abilities.description: Grants Legion Commander bonus attack speed upon cast.

abilities.name: Press the Attack
abilities.description: Applies a Strong Dispel on the unit-targeted ally while granting bonus movement speed and bonus health regeneration for a short time.

abilities.name: Moment of Courage
abilities.description: After a set number of incoming attacks, Tresdin counter-attacks with bonus lifesteal immediately.

abilities.name: Duel
abilities.description: Grants 2 stacks of the current ability values to the victor.
